programme.title: KICK 't MET
programme.desc: Kenneth Taylor blikt openhartig terug op zijn overstap van zijn vertrouwde 'warm bad' bij Ajax naar Serie A-topclub Lazio Roma. Hij bespreekt de tactische cultuurschok in Italië, het uiteenvallen van zijn Amsterdamse vriendengroep en de waardevolle lessen die hij meekreeg van Francesco Farioli. Tot slot laat de ambitieuze middenvelder er geen misverstand over bestaan: een toekomstige terugkeer naar zijn grote liefde Ajax sluit hij absoluut niet uit.

programme.title: UEFA Conference League
programme.desc: Verslag van de wedstrijd FK Vojvodina - Ajax, gespeeld in de tweede kwalificatieronde voor de UEFA Conference League.

programme.title: KICK 't MET
programme.desc: Sam Beukema schuift aan in zijn vertrouwde Deventer. De verdediger van Napoli praat openhartig over de enorme cultuurshock en de intense druk van het spelen in de stad van Diego Maradona. Hij deelt hoe het is om zijn vader als zaakwaarnemer te hebben, blikt terug op zijn legendarische lunch met Ruud Krol én legt uit wat het verdedigen in de Serie A nu echt een vak apart maakt. Tot slot reageert de nuchtere Overijsselaar eerlijk op het mislopen van het WK.

programme.title: Kick 't Met On Tour
programme.sub-title: De Coppa Italia finale Lazio - Inter
programme.desc: In een nieuwe aflevering van Kick 't Met On Tour: de Coppa Italia! Armin en Jefferson bezoeken in het iconische Stadio Olimpico de bekerfinale tussen Lazio en Inter. Eenmaal daar waren de heren onder de indruk van de sfeer en wie ze wel niet allemaal tegen kwamen. De nostalgische Italiaanse voetbalharten gingen sneller kloppen bij de mannen en na de wedstrijd deelde ze mee in de feestvreugde van Internazionale samen met Denzel Dumfries.

programme.title: Het finale duel: Ronaldo vs Messi
programme.desc: In deze documentaire de twee genieën die voorbestemd waren om een tijdperk te bepalen, botsten op hetzelfde podium. Deze documentaire onderzoekt de oorsprong van de rivaliteit tussen Cristiano Ronaldo en Lionel Messi, het moment waarop hun confrontatie het Spaanse voetbal veranderde en grootsheid in het moderne voetbal voorgoed herdefinieerde.

programme.title: Kick 't Met On Tour
programme.sub-title: Wat een Europa League finale in Istanbul!
programme.desc: In een nieuwe aflevering van Kick 't Met On Tour: de Europa League-finale in Istanbul! De seizoensafsluiter was er eentje! De Europa League-finale tussen Aston Villa en SC Freiburg. Prachtige goals, prachtige sfeer en een verdiende winnaar. Gesprekken met legendes als Marc Desailly tot de winnaars Ian Maatsen, Amadou Onana en Youri Tielemans. Een finale die we niet snel zullen vergeten.

programme.title: KICK 't MET
programme.desc: Sam Beukema schuift aan in zijn vertrouwde Deventer. De verdediger van Napoli praat openhartig over de enorme cultuurshock en de intense druk van het spelen in de stad van Diego Maradona. Hij deelt hoe het is om zijn vader als zaakwaarnemer te hebben, blikt terug op zijn legendarische lunch met Ruud Krol én legt uit wat het verdedigen in de Serie A nu echt een vak apart maakt. Tot slot reageert de nuchtere Overijsselaar eerlijk op het mislopen van het WK.

programme.title: LaLiga
programme.desc: Verslag van de wedstrijd Atlético Madrid - Real Madrid, gespeeld in de Spaanse LaLiga.

programme.title: KICK 't MET
programme.desc: Kenneth Taylor blikt openhartig terug op zijn overstap van zijn vertrouwde 'warm bad' bij Ajax naar Serie A-topclub Lazio Roma. Hij bespreekt de tactische cultuurschok in Italië, het uiteenvallen van zijn Amsterdamse vriendengroep en de waardevolle lessen die hij meekreeg van Francesco Farioli. Tot slot laat de ambitieuze middenvelder er geen misverstand over bestaan: een toekomstige terugkeer naar zijn grote liefde Ajax sluit hij absoluut niet uit.

programme.title: KICK 't MET
programme.desc: De mannen van Kick 't Met spreken met Calvin Bassey, ex-speler van Ajax en huidige verdediger van Fulham en het Nigeriaanse nationale team. Calvin blikt terug op zijn tijd in Amsterdam en reflecteert op wat er niet volgens plan liep.

programme.title: KICK 't MET
programme.desc: Tijjani Noslin deelt zijn onwaarschijnlijke levensverhaal van Subway-medewerker tot smaakmaker in de Serie A bij Lazio Roma. Hij praat openhartig over zijn moeilijke jeugd, de loodzware burn-out die hij onderweg overwon en de extreme druk van de kritische Italiaanse achterban. Tot slot legt de vastberaden aanvaller uit waarom hij zijn droom voor het Nederlands elftal nog niet opgeeft en hoe een emotioneel advies van zijn moeder hem deed besluiten om te blijven wachten op Oranje.

programme.title: Reparto Corse F1
programme.desc: Davide Camicioli e Matteo Bobbi presentano e analizzano i week end di gara di Formula 1. I momenti principali, le parole dei protagonisti e le prospettive mondiali dei contendenti.

programme.title: Belgio
programme.desc: L'analisi del Gran Premio disputato per commentare la gara insieme agli ospiti in studio. Riviviamo i brividi della corsa attraverso le immagini piu' spettacolari e ascoltiamo i commenti a caldo dei protagonisti.

programme.title: Little Italy: La Mercedes di Kimi
programme.desc: La Mercedes di Kimi Antonelli.

programme.title: Ungheria
programme.desc: Aspettando il Gran Premio d'Ungheria, tutte le emozioni delle ultime gare a Mogyrod.

programme.title: Reparto Corse F1
programme.desc: Davide Camicioli e Matteo Bobbi presentano e analizzano i week end di gara di Formula 1. I momenti principali, le parole dei protagonisti e le prospettive mondiali dei contendenti.

programme.title: GP Belgio: Gara
programme.desc: Decimo appuntamento del mondiale sulla pista di Spa: Antonelli guida la classifica con 25 punti di vantaggio su Russell e 32 su Hamilton. Telecronaca di Carlo Vanzini, Marc Gene' e Roberto Chinchero.

programme.title: Ungheria 2016 - F1
programme.desc: Campione in carica Hamilton che nella passata stagione ha conquistato con la Mercedes il suo terzo titolo mondiale piloti. Ventuno le gare in programma. A Budapest in pole position Rosberg.

programme.title: Ungheria 1997 - F1
programme.desc: Parte in testa il ferrarista Schumacher davanti al francese Villeneuve su Williams-Renault. In gara giro veloce di Frentzen su Williams.

programme.desc: Giallorossi sesti con 7 punti in 3 giornate. Viola imbattuti da 7 turni con 3 vittorie e 4 pareggi. Non vincono all'Olimpico da 7 stagioni, 2 pari e 5 ko. TC: Compagnoni-Montolivo

programme.title: Inter - Juventus
programme.desc: Nerazzurri imbattuti da 12 turni, 11 vittorie e un pari. Juve quarta dopo il 2-2 con la Lazio. Due vittorie a testa nelle ultime 7 sfide di A a San Siro. TC: Compagnoni-Marchegiani

programme.title: Stoccarda - Bayern
programme.desc: Dalla MHPArena di Stoccarda, Germania.

programme.title: Bayern Monaco: Una Squadra Da Record
programme.desc: Trascinato da Harry Kane e sotto la guida di Vincent Kompany, il Bayern Monaco vincitore di Bundesliga e coppa di Germania ha infranto numerosi primati.

programme.title: Leeds United - Liverpool
programme.desc: Dall'Elland Road di Leeds, Inghilterra.

programme.title: Colpi da maestro
programme.desc: Cristiana Buonamano conduce il talk show sul calciomercato "Colpi da Maestro" insieme a Luca Marchetti. Con Piero Ausilio e Giovanni Manna. Premiati anche Ludi, Antonelli e Carli.

programme.title: Buffa Racconta - Stag. 1 Ep. 36 - Buffa Racconta Gigi Riva 1a Parte 13/12/19
programme.desc: Le origini del mito nato due volte: dalle sponde del lago Maggiore a Cagliari. Il racconto di Federico Buffa dedicato a un mito del calcio e dello sport italiano: Gigi Riva.

programme.title: Buffa Racconta - Stag. 1 Ep. 37 - Buffa Racconta Gigi Riva 2a Parte 20/12/19
programme.desc: L'uomo nato due volte, la seconda per sempre. A 50 anni dallo storico scudetto conquistato dal Cagliari, il racconto di Federico Buffa dedicato a Gigi Riva.

programme.title: Juventus - Atletico M. 12/03/19
programme.desc: ... Atletico Madrid UEFA Champions League Story. - La Juve non ha mai vinto e non ha mai segnato nei 3 precedenti assoluti. Un solo punto e nessun gol dell'Atletico nelle ultime 2 trasferte. TC: Caressa-Bergomi.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain - Arsenal Finale:
programme.desc: ... Finale: UEFA Champions League. - Francesi per la seconda Champions consecutiva dopo il 5-0 all'Inter. Gunners per la prima Champions dopo la finale persa nel 2006 contro il Barcellona. TC: Marianella-Marchegiani

programme.title: Speciale Inter: Tutti I Gol Dello Scudetto

programme.title: Inter - Arsenal
programme.desc: Nerazzurri quinti con 12 punti. Vengono da 2 ko consecutivi (Atletico Madrid e Liverpool). Arsenal primo a punteggio pieno: 18 punti e un solo gol subito. TC: Caressa-Bergomi

Best of The OpenZone 2024
programme.desc: A look at the best moments from The Open Zone during 2024.

programme.title: Chronicles of a Champion Golfer...
programme.desc: A look at one of The Open's great champions. Here, the focus is on Nick Price, who won his sole Claret Jug back in 1994 at Turnberry.

programme.title: Chronicles Of A Champion Golfer...
programme.desc: Look back at the career of Louis Oosthuizen, one that is defined by his 2010 success at St Andrews, becoming the fourth South African golfer to win The Open Championship.

programme.title: Nick Dougherty's Tee Time Tips
programme.desc: In a winter special, Nick Dougherty shares his Tee Time Tips to help you improve your game out on the golf course.

programme.title: Best of The OpenZone 2023
programme.desc: A look at the best moments from The Open Zone at Royal Liverpool in 2023, with masterclasses and demonstrations from some of golf's finest players.

programme.title: Golf Academy:Kelly Feel Your Swing
programme.desc: Professional golfers give advice on how to improve your game across all aspects, from the tee to the green. Here, former PGA Tour winner Jerry Kelly on feeling your swing.

programme.title: Golf Academy: Lyle Practice Shots
programme.desc: Two-time Major champion and Hall of Famer Sandy Lyle gives you his tips for success on the course. Here, Sandy explains the essential shots that every golfer needs to practice.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Ep 15.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Here, how to chip effectively close to the green. Ep 18.

programme.title: Ladies European Tour Golf Hlts
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the 2026 Hulencourt Women's Open, a Ladies European Tour event taking place in Belgium.

programme.title: Women's Scottish Open 2025
programme.desc: The final round of the Women's Scottish Open, held at Dundonald Links. The 36-hole-leader Lottie Woad of England is bidding to win a first LPGA Tour title on her professional debut.

programme.title: Women in Golf: Breaking Tradition
programme.desc: ...Tradition. In this documentary, meet the pioneers who are shaping the future of golf as the sport that is often defined by history and tradition moves away from its male-dominated roots.

programme.title: Chevron Championship Day 4 Hlts
programme.desc: The concluding day of the Chevron Championship at Memorial Park. Taking a five-shot lead into the final round, Nelly Korda attempts to keep former champion Patty Tavatanakit at bay. (26.04)

programme.title: US Women's Open Golf R4 Hlts
programme.desc: The final day of the US Women's Open at the Riviera Country Club. Taking a share of the lead yesterday, Nelly Korda is primed to clinch a second straight Major title. (07.06)

programme.title: Women's PGA Championship Hlts
programme.desc: The final day at the 2026 KPMG Women's PGA Championship, won previously by Minjee Lee. Hazeltine National Golf Club is the venue for the third women's Major of the year. (28.06)

programme.title: Evian Championship Highlights
programme.desc: The final day of the Amundi Evian Championship at Evian Resort Golf Club. After her historic third-round performance, leader Haeran Ryu is poised to claim a second straight Major. (12.07)

programme.title: Women's Scottish Open 2025 Hlts
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the 2025 Women's Scottish Open, a Ladies European Tour event held at Dundonald Links on the Ayrshire coast. This year's field boasts 13 Major champions.

programme.title: Best of The Women's Openzone
programme.desc: Revisit the best of the Women's Open Zone at the 46th iteration of the tournament in East Lothian, Scotland - the scene of Ashleigh Buhai's victory at the final Major of the year.

programme.title: Roots: Annika Sorenstam
programme.desc: Chart the rise of Annika Sorenstam - a 10-time Major champion with 72 LPGA victories - by hearing from those who know her best, including family, friends, coaches and the Swede herself.

programme.title: PGA Tour Champions Highlights
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the Kaulig Companies Championship - a PGA Tour Champions event held at Firestone Country Club in Ohio.

programme.title: PL: Man Utd v Nott'm Forest Hlts
programme.desc: With Champions League football to look forward to next season, Manchester United's final home game of the campaign comes against Forest - who have guaranteed Premier League safety. (17.05)

programme.title: PL: Brentford v C. Palace Hlts
programme.desc: European hopefuls Brentford welcome Conference League finalists Palace to the Gtech Community Stadium in the Premier League. The Bees come from a 3-0 loss to Manchester City. (17.05)

programme.title: PL: Everton v Sunderland Hlts
programme.desc: Everton, still fighting for a place in Europe, host Sunderland at the Hill Dickinson Stadium. The Toffees were left frustrated at Selhurst last weekend, twice relinquishing a lead. (17.05)

programme.title: PL: Leeds Utd v Brighton Hlts
programme.desc: Brighton target three more points in their pursuit of Europe as Fabian Hurzeler's men, 3-0 winners over Wolves last week, visit a Leeds side guaranteed of Premier League safety. (17.05)

programme.title: PL: Wolves v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: Fulham go to relegated Wolves following a costly defeat to Bournemouth. With chances of Europe now slim, the Cottagers must win their last two and hope for favours elsewhere. (17.05)

programme.title: PL: Chelsea v Spurs Hlts
programme.desc: On the verge of safety, Spurs seek a point from their final two games, starting with a trip to bitter London rivals Chelsea - set for the summer arrival of new manager Xabi Alonso. (19.05)

programme.title: PL: Burnley v Wolves Hlts
programme.desc: Burnley and Wolves, both relegated and bound for the Championship, bring their respective campaigns to a close at Turf Moor. The winner here would finish up in 19th place. (24.05)

programme.title: PL: Fulham v Newcastle Hlts
programme.desc: Both out of European contention, Fulham and Newcastle meet at Craven Cottage on the final day to draw a line under disappointing 2025-26 campaigns. (24.05)

programme.title: PL: Nott'm Forest v B'mouth Hlts
programme.desc: With a place among Europe's elite a real possibility, Andoni Iraola's Bournemouth reign concludes on the road away to Forest - set for another season in the top flight. (24.05)

programme.title: PL: Sunderland v Chelsea Hlts
programme.desc: At the Stadium of Light, Sunderland and Chelsea enter a final-day showdown with both sides in the thick of the race for European football next season. (24.05)

programme.title: PL: Brighton v Man Utd Hlts
programme.desc: Targeting maximum points, Fabian Hurzeler's Brighton - desperate for final-day fixtures to go their way in the race for Europe - host Michael Carrick's third-placed United. (24.05)

programme.title: PL: Man City v Aston Villa Hlts
programme.desc: Leaving behind a remarkable legacy having won 20 major trophies in 10 years at the club, Pep Guardiola takes charge of his final City game against Europa League winners Villa. (24.05)

programme.title: PL: Liverpool v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: A frustrating campaign for Arne Slot and Liverpool concludes at home to European hopefuls Brentford. Almost home and dry, the Reds are still sweating on their Champions League spot. (24.05)

programme.title: PL: West Ham Utd v Leeds Utd Hlts
programme.desc: On the brink of a disastrous relegation from the Premier League, West Ham must win here against Leeds and hope relegation rivals Spurs lose at home to Everton. (24.05)

programme.title: PL: Spurs v Everton Hlts
programme.desc: Tottenham's fight to avoid the drop goes down to the final day. At home to impressive away performers Everton, Spurs hold a two-point advantage over relegation rivals West Ham. (24.05)

programme.title: PL: C. Palace v Arsenal Hlts
programme.desc: Arsenal's crowning moment comes at Selhurst Park, where the Premier League winners take on a Crystal Palace side looking ahead to next week's Conference League final. (24.05)

programme.title: PL Stories: A Family United
programme.desc: The story of the Singh brothers; lifelong Manchester United fans who have followed the club through every twist of its Premier League journey.

programme.title: PL 100 Club: Erling Haaland
programme.desc: As the unstoppable Erling Haaland storms his way into the Premier League's 100 Club, celebrate City's Norwegian goalscoring powerhouse showing no signs of slowing down.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: Relive the action from the Premier League in a unique way with fast-paced highlights using alternative angles, featuring every goal from every game.

programme.title: Premier League Netbusters
programme.desc: Relive the action from the Premier League in a unique way with fast-paced highlights using alternative angles, featuring every goal from every game.

programme.title: Premier League Review
programme.desc: A look back at the week's action in the Premier League, featuring all of the goals, news and major talking points from around the top flight.

programme.title: Premier League Review
programme.desc: A look back at the weekend's action in the Premier League, featuring all of the goals, news and major talking points from around the top flight.

programme.title: Premier League Years 2010/11
programme.desc: As Sky Sports celebrates 24 years as the home of the Premier League, a look at memorable moments from the 2010-2011 season. The relegation battle went down to the final day of the season.

programme.title: Live: The Hundred
programme.desc: At the Utilita Bowl in Southampton, Lauren Bell's Southern Brave and Sophie Devine's Welsh Fire open their Women's Hundred campaigns. Fire are looking to improve on a poor 2025 campaign.

programme.title: Live: The Hundred
programme.desc: At the Utilita Bowl in Southampton, the 2021 champions Southern Brave and Welsh Fire - Joe Root's side for this year's campaign - open their Men's Hundred journeys.

programme.title: Live World Matchplay Darts D5
programme.desc: Cameron Menzies and Ross Smith get night five of the World Matchplay underway before Gian van Veen plays Wessel Nijman, Gerwyn Price faces Rob Cross and James Wade tackles Ryan Searle.

programme.title: EFL P/O 97-98: Charlton v Sun'land
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, the Division One play-off final from the 1997-98 season between Charlton and Sunderland at Wembley.

programme.title: SPFL 1998/99: Rangers v Celtic
programme.desc: Classic action from the Scottish Premiership. Here, Rangers take on Celtic in the top flight back in 1999.

programme.title: SPFL 1998/99: Celtic v Rangers
programme.desc: Classic action from the Scottish Premiership. Here, Rangers travel to Celtic Park in 1999, knowing a win against rivals Celtic would clinch the Scottish title.

programme.title: EFL 00/01: Bolton v Preston
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic clash from the Football League. Here, Bolton Wanderers and Preston North End meet in the First Division play-off final at the Millennium Stadium back in 2001.

programme.title: EFL 02/03: Sheff Utd v Wolves
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic English Football League clash. Here, Sheffield United and Wolves meet in the First Division play-off final at the Millennium Stadium in Cardiff back in 2003.

programme.title: Championship Season Review 13/14
programme.desc: A season review of the 2013-2014 season in the Sky Bet Championship, with a look at all of the biggest stories and key matches from across the season.

programme.title: SPFL 2017/18: Hearts v Rangers
programme.desc: Relive some classic action from the Scottish Premiership. Here, Hearts host Rangers in October 2017 in a four-goal thriller that saw the Ibrox club come from behind.

programme.title: SPFL 2017/18: Rangers v Aberdeen
programme.desc: Relive some classic action from the Scottish Premiership. Here, Rangers host rivals Aberdeen at Ibrox in November 2017 in a game that saw the Glasgow club dominate.

programme.title: EFL 06/07: N. Forest v Yeovil
programme.desc: Relive a classic clash from the English Football League. Here, Nottingham Forest face Yeovil in their Sky Bet League One play-off semi-final second leg at the City Ground in 2007.

programme.title: EFL 08/09: Cardiff v Swansea
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic clash from the English Football League. Here, Cardiff City meet Swansea City in a thrilling south Wales derby at Ninian Park in 2009.

programme.title: Retro C'Ship 19: A.Villa v Derby
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from years gone by in the Championship play-offs. Here, the 2019 play-off final between Aston Villa and Derby County.

programme.title: EFL P/O 13-14: Derby County v QPR
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, Derby and QPR met at Wembley in the 2013-14 play-off final.

programme.title: EFL P/O 14-15: Preston v Chester'd
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, Preston's semi-final second leg with Chesterfield in the 2014-15 League One play-offs.

programme.title: EFL P/O 14-15: Swindon v Sheff Utd
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, Swindon and Sheffield United met in the second leg of their 2014-15 League One play-off semi-final.

programme.title: EFL P/O 16-17: Bradford v Millwall
programme.desc: A chance to relive some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, Bradford City and Millwall contested the 2016-17 League One play-off final at Wembley.

programme.title: SPFL 21/22: Celtic v Rangers
programme.desc: Celtic and Rangers collide in the Old Firm derby to kick off 2022 in the Scottish Premiership. Rangers came out on top back in August with a 1-0 win at Ibrox.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Aston Villa v N. Forest
programme.desc: A look back at some classic matches from the English Football League. Here, Aston Villa play Nottingham Forest in a thrilling draw in September 2016 in the Sky Bet Championship.

programme.title: EFL 16/17: Cardiff v Bristol City
programme.desc: Relive some classic matches in English football. Here, Cardiff City face Bristol City in a Severnside derby in the Sky Bet Championship, in what was Neil Warnock's first game at Cardiff.

programme.title: EFL Cup 19/20: A.Villa v Man City
programme.desc: It all comes down to this: Aston Villa and Manchester City go toe-to-toe for the first silverware of the season in the Carabao Cup final at Wembley. City are the reigning champions.

programme.title: EFL Cup Best Goals: 2019/20
programme.desc: A look at the very best goals from across another dramatic campaign in the 2019-20 Carabao Cup, all the way to the final between Aston Villa and Man City.

programme.title: EFL Trophy Final 2019/20
programme.desc: Portsmouth and Salford City go head-to-head in the rearranged 2020 Papa John's Trophy final at Wembley Stadium.

programme.title: EFL League 2 Play-Off Final: 17/18
programme.desc: Coventry City and Exeter City go head-to-head in the Sky Bet League Two play-off final at Wembley. The sides each beat each other once during the regular season.

programme.title: EFL League 1 Play-Off Final: 17/18
programme.desc: Rotherham United take on Shrewsbury Town at Wembley in the Sky Bet League One play-off final. The sides each beat each other once during the regular season.

programme.title: EFL C'Ship Play-Off Final: 17/18
programme.desc: Fulham and Aston Villa meet in the Sky Bet Championship play-off final at Wembley. Villa are looking to end a two-year exile from the Premier League, Fulham were last there in 2014.

programme.title: SPFL 23/24: Celtic v Rangers
programme.desc: With the battle lines drawn, Old Firm rivals Celtic and Rangers collide in the race for the Scottish Premiership title. Celtic remain three clear with a superior goal difference. (11.05)

programme.title: EFL 17/18: Bristol City v Man Utd
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL Cup. Here, Bristol City host Premier League Man Utd at Ashton Gate in the 2017-18 competition's quarter-finals.

programme.title: EFL 17/18: Leeds v Bristol City
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Leeds United host Bristol City at Elland Road in the Sky Bet Championship in a match that saw a dramatic comeback.

programme.title: Retro EFL Cup 10:A.Villa v Man Utd
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic League Cup final. Here, Aston Villa and Manchester United meet in the 2009-10 final at Wembley.

programme.title: EFL League 2 Play-Off Final: 18/19
programme.desc: Newport County and Tranmere Rovers face off at Wembley in the Sky Bet League Two play-off final, with the final place in next season's League One on the line.

programme.title: EFL League 1 Play-Off Final: 18/19
programme.desc: Charlton Athletic take on Sunderland at Wembley in the Sky Bet League One play-off final. These sides famously met in the Division One play-off final back in 1998 in a 4-4 thriller.

programme.title: EFL C'Ship Play-Off Final: 18/19
programme.desc: Dean Smith's Aston Villa and Frank Lampard's Derby County meet at Wembley in the Sky Bet Championship play-off final, as the final side in next year's Premier League is confirmed.

programme.title: SPFL 24/25: Celtic v Rangers
programme.desc: The first Old Firm derby of the Scottish Premiership season comes from Celtic Park, as Brendan Rodgers' champions entertain Glasgow city rivals, Philippe Clement's Rangers. (01.09)

programme.title: EFL 17/18: Arsenal v Man City
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL Cup. Here, Arsenal and Man City go head-to-head in the final of the 2017-18 competition at Wembley.
